specs.title: cp-000: All slides displayed as thumbnails with slide numbers
cp-001: Active slide has a highlighted border
cp-002: Clicking a thumbnail activates that slide
cp-003: ShiftClick toggles multi-slide selection
cp-004: Hidden slides appear at 50 opacity with an eye-slash icon
cp-005: Regenerating slides show Regenerating status label
cp-006: Collaboration presence dots shown per slide
cp-007: Drag handle appears on hover 6-dot icon
cp-008: Dragging a slide reorders it in the filmstrip
cp-009: Drop target highlights correctly
cp-010: Reorder persists after release
cp-011: Add Slide button at bottom of filmstrip
cp-012: New slide inserted after active slide
cp-013: New Slide inserts after the right-clicked slide
cp-014: Duplicate Slide creates a copy
cp-015: Copy Slide copies to clipboard
cp-016: Cut Slide copies and removes disabled if only 1 slide
cp-017: Paste Slide pastes from clipboard disabled if clipboard empty
cp-018: Move to Beginning moves slide to position 1
cp-019: Move to End moves slide to last position
cp-020: Regenerate with AI opens regenerate dialog
cp-021: Regenerate Selected Slides batch regenerate multi-select
cp-022: Hide Slide toggles hidden flag
cp-023: Change Layout submenu with all standard layouts
cp-024: Apply Master submenu with No Master all masters
cp-025: Export as PNG HD exports current slide as PNG ShiftClick 3x scale
cp-026: Export as SVG exports current slide as SVG
cp-027: Delete Slide removes slide disabled if only 1 slide reddanger style
cp-028: Click on title text to enter inline edit mode
cp-029: Click on subtitle text to enter inline edit mode
cp-030: Changes save on blur click away
cp-031: Master slide placeholder prompts shown when empty
cp-032: Click a block to select it blue selection outline
cp-033: ShiftClick to addremove from multi-selection
cp-034: Click on canvas background deselects all blocks
